**Problem / use case**

**Proposed capability**

**Surfaces / modes it applies to**
- Surfaces: desktop | web | SDK
- Modes: view | edit | suggest

**Reuse check** (which existing block — EmbedPDF / pdf-lib / collab / Rust core — or is it genuinely new?)

**Licensing** (any new dep must be MIT/Apache/BSD)

**Roadmap phase / gate**
